content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

The implementation is well-structured and correct. The change extracts inline `RecordProducer::Agent` construction into a shared `agent_record_producer()` helper that derives `backend_family` and `model_id` from `InvocationEnvelope.metadata` (specifically `backend_used.family` and `model_used.model_id`). The helper is applied consistently across all four call-sites: `engine.rs` (main stage invocation), `completion.rs` (completer panel), `final_review.rs` (reviewer/voter/arbiter invocations), and `prompt_review.rs` (refiner/validator invocations). Each inner `invoke_*` function now returns `(Value, RecordProducer)` instead of just `Value`, capturing producer metadata at the point where the envelope is available rather than reconstructing it from the resolved target. The conformance test was tightened to assert specific `backend_family` and `model_id` values. A unit test covers the helper. No remaining inline `RecordProducer::Agent` construction exists in production code. No amendments needed.

## Amendments

None.
